## Session Notes

- Do not rename sample IDs from `docs/templates/material_calibration_one_session.csv`.
- If a tool is unavailable, leave that row `todo` and note the missing tool here. Do not substitute another tool.
- Mark a row `ready` only when `photo_file` points to a real photo or scan.
- Use the same lighting and exposure for all physical photos in a paper group.
